title: PPS as the space of the bodily self
citation: Noel, J.-P., Pfeiffer, C., Blanke, O., & Serino, A. (2015). Peripersonal space as the space of the bodily self. Cognition, 144, 49-57.
notes: Audio-tactile PPS task intermingled with full-body-illusion stroking. The template captures the PPS trial schedule; FBI stroking and front/back experimental context must be configured in the lab protocol.

provenance.source: Methods lines report 72 PPS trials, 24 baseline trials, and 12 catch trials per block.
Methods lines report six sound distances D6-D1 with tactile timing corresponding to the spatial dimension.
